projectDescription: A server-driven reactive UI framework for Java 21 that enables building fully interactive single-page applications entirely in Java, with state managed on the server and DOM updates delivered to the browser via WebSocket.
keyFeatures: Server-driven reactive UI — all state and logic lives on the JVM, no custom JavaScript required
WebSocket-powered live DOM updates with fine-grained delta pushes to the browser
Mustache-style template language with conditionals, loops, and child component composition
AOT annotation processor generates zero-reflection accessors and pre-compiled client-side JS templates at build time
Multiple rendering modes: SSR with hydration, CSR shells, server-owned HTML-on-the-wire, and stateless token-based
Smart reactive collections (SmartList, SmartSet, SmartMap) with fine-grained ADD/REMOVE/SET delta events
Built-in Spring Boot auto-configuration with full Spring DI support in route components
Undertow-based standalone mode for deployments without Spring Boot
Redis-backed distributed state store with L1/L2 Caffeine+Redis hybrid caching for horizontal scaling
SPA router with partial page rendering via X-Partial header and Idiomorph DOM morphing
Optimistic UI DSL for zero-latency perceived interactions with automatic server-error rollback
Scoped CSS compilation with component-level selector prefixing at build time
Bean Validation (Jakarta) integration for @Call method arguments with per-field error display
Built-in UI component library: JButton, JInput, JSelect, JCheckBox, JForm, JTable, JCard, JModal, Link
publicApiSurface: HtmlComponent — base class for all components; override template(), onInit(), onMount(), onUnmount()
ReactiveVar<T> — observable value cell: get(), set(T), onChange(Consumer<T>)
Type<T> — ergonomic reactive field wrapper: Type.of(v), Type.$(v), .get(), .set()
SmartList<E> / SmartSet<E> / SmartMap<K,V> — observable collections with delta change events
@State — marks a field as reactive server state synced over WebSocket
@Bind — marks a field as a property bindable from a parent component template
@Call — marks a method as browser-callable; invoked via POST /call/{ComponentId.method}
@Route(path) — maps a component class to a URL path (supports {param} placeholders)
@Layout(Class) — wraps a page component in a layout shell component
@Param(name) / @UrlParam(name) — injects URL path or query parameters into fields
@Stateful — persists component state to Redis for distributed/multi-pod deployments
@StatefulRam — persists component state in JVM memory (Caffeine cache)
@Stateless — zero server memory; state travels in a signed LZ4+HMAC token in the page
@Client — activates CSR mode; component renders from a pre-compiled JS template client-side
@DomMode(SERVER_OWNED | CLIENT_MANAGED) — controls DOM ownership strategy
EventBus — in-process pub/sub: on(event, handler), emit(event, payload)
StateStore — SPI interface: get/put/replace(CAS)/remove/removeSession
ComponentAccessor<T> — AOT-generated SPI: read, write, call, getAst, getScopedCss
ComponentFactory — SPI for component instantiation (default: no-arg constructor reflection)
RouteProvider — SPI: resolve(path) returns component instance + path parameters
JrxSession — WebSocket session abstraction: sendText, getId, isOpen, close, setAttr/getAttr
JReactiveServer — Undertow standalone server entry point (no Spring required)
JRX.Store.set(key, value) / JRX.Store.get(key) / JRX.Store.bind(key, fn) — client-side JS global store
